text: A game that offers a lot of suspense and combat

Back when the name Bioware used to mean something we got this awesome trilogy  of space-opera rpg games that are unsurpassed even today. 
I first played this on Xbox 360 at my local Internet café when  was just a kid and it stayed with me through all these years. Now I have replayed it with the same Shepard  I did back then to relieve one of the greatest stories ever told in gaming.
Today's Bioware could never make something like this and it is clear why they have fallen, their games from almost 2 decades ago are better and more impactful then anything they put out recently.
very vreatice, very unique, very fun and the art in the game is fire!
Controls are a little clunky regardless of whether you use gamepad or mouse/keyboard, but the game is a lot of fun.

I bought this game on a crazy sale. I think it's worth it. I bought it despite having it on my Xbox game pass. I just wanted to play it on PC because the graphics are awesome. I absolutely love the cutscenes; I don't get the hate. While there is a lack of action, I do think the action, while short, is awesome in itself. Especially the ones against the creepy guys in the cenote.

This game came out in 2018, I think, and it should get a price decrease at this point. Nevertheless, if this game is on sale, it's a 10/10 PURCHASE, and I would absolutely recommend it to anyone who loves mystery and exploration games.
